specs.title: E2E-RPT-CON-01: Reports page shows consolidated layout
E2E-RPT-CON-02 (NEGATIVE): Old standalone Alerts section no longer exists
E2E-BELL-01: Notification bell shows badge when alerts exist
E2E-BELL-02 (NEGATIVE): Bell popover closes when clicking outside
E2E-RPT-01: Reports page shows tabs for by-program, by-cost-center, by-person
E2E-RPT-02: By-cost-center report tab loads data (CR-14)
E2E-RPT-03: By-person report tab loads data (CR-15)
E2E-RPT-01: Utilization report loads with real data
E2E-RPT-02: Export CSV button works
can access Dashboard, Time Entry, Calendar; cannot see Approvals, Reports, Budget, Admin
can access Approvals page with Pending and Team tabs
can access Reports and Budget; cannot see Approvals or Admin
can access Reports, Budget, Charge Codes; cannot see Approvals or Admin
can see all nav items including Admin section
fill hours and submit
approve pending timesheets
timesheet shows approved or later status
E2E-SYS-01: Sidebar shows RIS logo (CR-19)
E2E-SYS-02: Avatar shows real initials not "U" (CR-20 / BUG-01)
E2E-SYS-03: Chat widget is present on the page (CR-21)
E2E-SYS-04: Admin users page shows no Active badge (BUG-02/03)
E2E-SYS-05: Help sidebar link opens user manual in new tab
E2E-BUG-01: Auth state listener invalidates cache on sign out (CR-18)
E2E-TE-01: Period selector dropdown shows 104 weeks (CR-04)
E2E-TE-02: Copy from previous loads charge codes (CR-05)
E2E-TE-03: LEAVE-001 system row auto-fills for vacation days (CR-06)
E2E-TE-04: Submit blocked when hours insufficient on weekdays (NEGATIVE)
E2E-TE-05: Week navigation changes the displayed period
E2E-TE-06: Request charge code access dialog (CR-07)
E2E-TE-07: Request CC access fails without reason (NEGATIVE, CR-07)
E2E-TS-01: Create timesheet and add entries
E2E-TS-02: Submit timesheet for approval
E2E-TS-03: Submit empty timesheet shows warning (NEGATIVE)
E2E-TS-04: Week navigation changes the displayed period
E2E-MANUAL-01: Page loads without auth
